zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues de Lusignan於大約1141年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old36歲，母親Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay32歲。他於大約1162年與Orengarde de Rancon在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1169年4月11日在巴勒斯坦享年29歲，埋葬在法國波特芝士庫賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues de Lusignan于大约1141年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南时，他的父亲Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old36岁，母亲Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay32岁。他于大约1162年与Orengarde de Rancon在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1169年4月11日在巴勒斯坦享年29岁，埋葬在法国波特芝士庫賀。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues de Lusignan was born about 1141, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, was 36 and his mother, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, was 32. He married Orengarde de Rancon about 1162, in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 11 April 1169, in Palestine, at the age of 29, and was buried in Couhé, Poitou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues de Lusignan est né environ 1141, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Orengarde de Rancon environ 1162, à Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1169, à Palestine, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Couhé, Poitou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues de Lusignan um 1141 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old 36 und seine Mutter Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay 32. Er hat um 1162 in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Orengarde de Rancon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 11. April 1169 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Couhé, Poitou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Lusignan è nato il circa 1141 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Orengarde de Rancon circa 1162, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 11 aprile 1169, nel Palestina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Couhé, Poitou, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues de Lusignanが約1141年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Oldは36歳，母Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenayは32歳であった。約1162年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンルシグナンでOrengarde de Ranconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1169年4月11日にパレスチナで29歳で死去し，フランスポイトウコウheにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues de Lusignan(이)가 대략 1141년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1162년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 루시그난에서 Orengarde de Rancon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1169년 4월 11일 팔레스타인에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 포이토우 코우he에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues de Lusignan nasceu aproximadamente 1141, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Orengarde de Rancon aproximadamente 1162, em Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de abril de 1169, em Palestina, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Couhé, Poitou, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues de Lusignan родился около 1141 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Orengarde de Rancon около 1162 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 11 апреля 1169 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности коухe, поитоу, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues de Lusignan nació aproximadamente 1141, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Orengarde de Rancon aproximadamente 1162, en Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 11 de abril de 1169, en Palestina, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Couhé, Poitou, Francia.
